clinic_name: Surya Dental Care and Implant Clinic
tagline: Holistic Dental Care — Advanced. Precise. Personal.
motto: Providing HOLISTIC DENTAL CARE. Every aspect of our health is interconnected and so is our dental health.
about: With the most advanced equipment and complete sterilization, we are specialized in all aspects of dentistry with professional care and high degree of precision. Consultation and dental education is absolutely free.

location.address: Plot No. 411/A, 1st Floor, Industrial & Business Park, Phase-2, Chandigarh – 160002

doctor.name: Dr. Ankush Jindal
doctor.title: BDS, MPH
doctor.bio: With over 13 years of experience, Dr. Ankush Jindal excels in Dental Implants, Full Mouth Rehabilitation, Smile Designing, Cosmetic Dentistry, and Preventive Dentistry. He believes prevention is better than cure and keeps the clinic equipped with the latest dental technology.

services.name: Dental Implants
services.description: Titanium implant-supported restorations for a natural-looking permanent smile.

services.name: Smile Designing
services.description: Full cosmetic makeovers combining veneers, whitening and alignment.

services.name: Root Canal Treatment
services.description: Single-sitting painless RCT with advanced rotary systems.

services.name: Crowns & Bridges
services.description: Ceramic and zirconia crowns fabricated with digital precision.

services.name: Teeth Whitening
services.description: In-office laser whitening for instantly brighter smiles.

services.name: Veneers
services.description: Ultra-thin porcelain veneers — virtually undetectable and stain-resistant.

services.name: Orthodontics & Aligners
services.description: Braces and clear aligner therapy for all age groups.

services.name: Scaling & Polishing
services.description: Professional deep cleaning to prevent gum disease.

services.name: Tooth Extractions
services.description: Surgical and simple extractions including impacted wisdom teeth.

services.name: Dentures & Prosthetics
services.description: Complete and partial dentures, acrylic and metal-based.

services.name: Flap Surgery
services.description: Periodontal flap surgeries for advanced gum disease management.

services.name: Paediatric Dentistry
services.description: Gentle, child-friendly dental care from an early age.

services.name: Composite Fillings
services.description: Tooth-coloured composite restorations — metal-free and durable.

services.name: Full Mouth Rehabilitation
services.description: Comprehensive reconstruction for heavily worn or missing dentition.

seo.meta_title: Surya Dental Care and Implant Clinic | Chandigarh
seo.meta_description: Best dental clinic in Chandigarh offering implants, smile design, RCT, whitening & more. Visit Dr. Ankush Jindal at Industrial Area Phase-2, opposite Fountain Park.
